text: CHARGE SHEET (final report u/s 173 CrPC). FIR 00077/2026 u/s 420 IPC. The fraud was first reported by an informant who works as the night watchman at the GreenView apartments; it was his sister, the school teacher in the next block, who actually overheard the accused planning the transfer and passed the tip to her brother. To protect them, the station has treated their identities as confidential. The accused, Sandeep Malhotra, was identified from bank records. Recovered amount: Rs. 2,40,000.
